hmong.wind_powered_future: Lub Neej Yav Tom Ntej Uas Cua Ua Zog
hmong.denmark_gets_55_of_electricity_from_wi: Denmark twb tau 55% ntawm nws electricity los ntawm cua.
hmong.the_world_adds_renewables_faster_than_: Lub ntiaj teb ntxiv renewables ceev dua li yav dhau los.
hmong.stable_for_10_000_years_holocene_clima: Ruaj khov tau 10,000 xyoo. Holocene climate uas tag nrho tib neeg civilization loj hlob.
hmong.charles_david_keeling_begins_continuou: Charles David Keeling pib ntsuas CO₂ tsis tu ncua ntawm Mauna Loa. Nws txoj curve ua pov thawj tias human-caused warming yog tseeb.
hmong.climate_scientist_james_hansen_tells_u: Climate scientist James Hansen qhia US Congress tias warming twb pib lawm. 350 ppm raug suav yog “safe” ceiling los ntawm 350.org.
hmong.first_time_atmospheric_co_crossed_400_: Thawj zaug uas atmospheric CO₂ hla 400 ppm hauv 3+ million xyoo. Lub ntiaj teb qhov 400 ppm era kawg: tropical forests ntawm ob tog poles.
hmong.current_level_highest_in_at_least_800_: Tam sim no theem. Siab tshaj yam tsawg kawg 800,000 xyoo (los ntawm ice cores). Sib npaug ~1.2°C warming.
hmong.threshold_associated_with_2_c_warming_: Threshold cuam tshuam nrog 2°C warming yog tias txuas ntxiv. Paris Agreement target: nyob qis dua 1.5°C.
hmong.mass_coral_bleaching_events_hit_the_gr: Mass coral bleaching events ntaus Great Barrier Reef hauv 2016, 2017, 2020, 2022, thiab 2024. Ntawm 1.5°C warming, 70–90% ntawm tropical coral reefs tuag. Ntawm 2°C, 99% tuag.
hmong.the_greenland_ice_sheet_holds_enough_w: Greenland ice sheet muaj dej txaus ua rau sea level nce 7 meters (23 ft). Ntawm ~1.5°C txuas ntxiv, kev yaj ho tsis rov qab tau hauv ntau pua xyoo txog ntau txhiab xyoo.
hmong.the_atlantic_meridional_overturning_ci: AMOC circulation txav cua sov los ntawm tropics mus rau Europe. Nws twb qaug zog 15% txij 1950. Kev kaw tag nrho yuav ua rau sab qaum teb Europe txias heev thaum ua rau monsoons cuam tshuam hauv Africa thiab Asia.
hmong.the_amazon_generates_half_its_own_rain: Amazon tsim ib nrab ntawm nws tus kheej nag. Nrog 20–25% deforestation + kub nce, nws muaj feem hloov los ntawm rainforest mus rau savanna. Qee cov kev tshawb fawb qhia tias threshold ze rau 2°C nrog cov deforestation rates tam sim no.
hmong.arctic_permafrost_holds_twice_the_carb: Arctic permafrost muaj carbon ob npaug ntawm qhov tam sim no hauv atmosphere. Warming 3–4× ceev dua global average, nws twb yaj thiab tso CO₂ thiab methane (muaj zog dua CO₂ 28× hauv 100 xyoo).
hmong.marine_based_ice_sheets_anchored_below: Marine-based ice sheets uas khi nyob qis dua sea level. Cov dej hiav txwv sov tab tom noj lawv los ntawm hauv qab. Thwaites Glacier (“Doomsday Glacier”) yog qhov risk tseem ceeb. Kev pob yuav ua rau sea level nce 3.3 meters (11 ft).
hmong.northern_coniferous_forests_russia_can: Northern coniferous forests (Russia, Canada, Scandinavia) raug ntxhov los ntawm warming, bark beetles, thiab wildfires. Kev hloov tag nrho mus rau grassland tuaj yeem tso ntau carbon uas khaws cia.
hmong.the_gulf_of_maine_has_warmed_faster_th: Gulf of Maine twb warming ceev dua 99% ntawm lub ntiaj teb cov dej hiav txwv txij 1980 — kwv yees 0.5°F ib decade, kwv yees 3× ntawm global ocean average. Cov dej txias Labrador current twb qaug zog thaum Gulf Stream cov dej sov tuaj txog sab qaum teb deb dua, hloov food web los ntawm hauv paus real-time. Penobscot, Passamaquoddy, Maliseet, thiab Mi’kmaq coastal communities twb sau cov kev hloov no hauv oral record ntau xyoo ua ntej satellites paub meej.
hmong.cheapest_electricity_worldwide_in_2024: Electricity pheej yig tshaj thoob ntiaj teb hauv 2024. Capacity ob npaug txhua xyoo hauv ntau cheeb tsam.
hmong.cheapest_electricity_in_history_grid_i: Electricity pheej yig tshaj hauv keeb kwm. Grid integration yog qhov challenge tseem ceeb tam sim no.
hmong.distributed_resilient_typical_5kw_syst: Distributed + resilient. Typical 5kW system payback: 6–10 xyoo.
hmong.1_3_of_food_is_wasted_preventing_waste: 1/3 ntawm zaub mov raug pov tseg. Kev tiv thaiv waste zam methane los ntawm landfills THIAB cov emissions los cog zaub mov.
hmong.not_100_vegan_even_cutting_beef_3_a_we: Tsis yog 100% vegan — txawm txiav nqaij nyuj 3× ib lim tiam kuj muaj impact loj. Tso av rau reforestation.
hmong.restore_125m_hectares_protects_biodive: Kho 125M hectares. Tiv thaiv biodiversity + rub CO₂ los ntawm photosynthesis.
hmong.plant_where_natural_conditions_support: Cog qhov chaw uas natural conditions txhawb kev loj hlob. Co-benefits: txias, watershed protection.
hmong.integrating_trees_into_grazing_land_li: Sib xyaw ntoo rau grazing land. Tsiaj tau ntxoov ntxoo; av khaws carbon 4× ntau dua bare pasture.
hmong.no_till_cover_crops_diverse_rotations_: No-till + cover crops + diverse rotations. Tsim soil carbon thaum khaws yields.
hmong.peatlands_store_3_more_carbon_than_for: Peatlands khaws carbon 3× ntau dua forests thoob ntiaj teb. Drained peat = tus emitter loj.
hmong.hfcs_are_1_000_9_000_more_potent_than_: HFCs cov gas muaj zog dua CO₂ 1,000–9,000×. Kigali Amendment (2016) tab tom rho tawm.
hmong.evs_produce_50_70_less_lifetime_emissi: EVs tsim lifetime emissions tsawg dua gas 50–70% — zoo dua thaum grid huv.
hmong.electric_trains_move_a_passenger_km_at: Electric trains txav ib passenger-km ntawm 1/10 ntawm tsheb emissions.
hmong.dutch_cycling_cities_have_1_3_the_tran: Dutch cycling cities muaj 1/3 ntawm transport emissions. Infrastructure tsim tus cwj pwm.
hmong.insulation_heat_pumps_led_lighting_us_: Insulation + heat pumps + LED lighting. US buildings siv 40% ntawm primary energy.
hmong.3_4_more_efficient_than_gas_furnaces_w: Efficient dua gas furnaces 3–4×. Ua haujlwm txog −15°C hauv modern cold-climate models.
hmong.consistently_top_ranked_educated_women: Ib txwm nyob saum toj. Cov poj niam kawm ntawv muaj menyuam tsawg dua THIAB muaj lub neej impact siab dua. Sib sau thoob generations.

hmong.thresholds_where_the_system_shifts_sta: Thresholds qhov twg system hloov state thiab nyob ntawd — Greenland melt, Amazon dieback, AMOC slowdown. Recent work qhia tias qee qhov tej zaum ze dua li xav.

hmong.drawdown_ranks_100_solutions_by_gigato: Drawdown ranks 100 solutions los ntawm gigatons ntawm CO₂ zam tau. Refrigerants, food waste, thiab educating girls nyob saum toj — tsis yog li feem ntau tib neeg xav.

hmong.associated_with_2_5_c_warming_displace: Cuam tshuam nrog ~2.5°C warming. Ua rau tib neeg tsiv chaw ntau dua txhua tsov rog hauv keeb kwm. Hurricane surge ua kev puas tsuaj rau inland areas.
hmong.likely_by_2300_at_3_c_entire_nations_l: Feem ntau los ntawm 2300 ntawm 3°C. Tag nrho cov teb chaws poob viable territory. New Orleans, Venice, ntau ntawm Vietnam.

hmong.you_hit_deep_decarbonization_across_se: Koj ncav deep decarbonization thoob sectors, tsim resilience, thiab tuav equity nyob nruab nrab. Qhov no yog li cas ib qho successful climate transition zoo li thaum social contract tuav.
hmong.significant_decarbonization_across_the: Significant decarbonization thoob energy thiab transport sectors, tab sis adaptation thiab justice qeeb. Cov carbon curves yog raug; political coalition tsis ruaj.
hmong.some_sectors_moved_others_stalled_publ: Qee sectors txav. Lwm tus stalled. Public support tsub raws sijhawm. Qhov no yog trajectory uas feem ntau real-world climate policies twb khiav.
hmong.decarbonization_stalled_adaptation_gap: Decarbonization stalled. Adaptation gaps nthuav. Public support pob. Qhov no yog trajectory uas peb ua haujlwm zam: climate impacts sib sau tsis muaj social los yog technical infrastructure los teb.
hmong.initial_conditions_are_workable_spread: Initial conditions ua tau. Faib investment thoob 2-3 sectors hauv thawj lub sijhawm los nrhiav cov feedback rules twg fire ua ntej. Public education + citizen assemblies them qeeb tab sis ruaj.
hmong.positive_feedback_dominates_earth_warm: Positive feedback dominates; lub ntiaj teb warms mus rau ib qho equilibrium kub dua. (Ib qho tseeb “runaway” greenhouse — oceans boiling away — yog ib qho Venus scenario, tsis yog lub ntiaj teb ntawm cov forcings no.)
hmong.high_albedo_negative_feedback_ice_age_: High albedo + negative feedback. Ice-age trajectory.
hmong.forcings_partially_offset_climate_slow: Forcings partially offset. Climate slowly drifts.
hmong.energy_balance_diagram_shortwave_sunli: Energy-balance diagram: shortwave sunlight hla greenhouse-gas layer thiab warms qhov surface; surface radiates infrared, qee qhov uas gas layer absorbs thiab re-emits rov qab hauv qab, cuab heat.
hmong.hypothesis_when_does_albedo_overcome_g: Hypothesis: Thaum twg albedo overcome GHG forcing?
hmong.explain_how_albedo_cloud_feedback_and_: Piav qhia yuav ua li cas albedo, cloud feedback, thiab GHGs ua ke tsav climate state.
